sections.paragraph:
Λόγγος, ου, ὁ (Lat. cognomen; pap; Jos., Bell. 6, 186) Longus Aa I 112, 4 (par. AcPl Ha 9, 17f). S. prec. entry.

Lat. Lat. = Latin

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Longus Longus , II ?a.d.—List 5

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

par. par. = parallel

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

prec. prec. = preceding

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 597
